articles.title: Uranium enrichment: key sticking point at center of US-Iran nuclear talks - ynetnews
articles.snippet: One of the central issues in negotiations between the United States and Iran is the fate of enriched uranium, a material critical to both nuclear energy and weapons. For nuclear power plants, enrichment to about 3% to 5% uranium-235 is typically sufficient, though some reactors require up to 20%. Gl

articles.title: Report: Iran has 11 tons of uranium, enough for up to 100 nuclear weapons - ynetnews
articles.snippet: # Report: Iran has 11 tons of uranium, enough for up to 100 nuclear weapons. ## Most of the stockpile was accumulated after the 2018 collapse of the nuclear deal, with material stored at multiple enrichment levels and in fortified sites, complicating monitoring and any effort to limit Iran’s nuclear
